mathematics.question: Define set and its types.
mathematics.answer: A set is a well-defined collection of distinct objects. Types include finite, infinite, empty, singleton, and universal sets. Finite sets have limited elements while infinite sets do not. Empty set has no elements. Sets are used in relations and probability.

mathematics.question: Explain union and intersection.
mathematics.answer: Union (A ∪ B) contains all elements from both sets. Intersection (A ∩ B) contains common elements. These operations follow laws like commutative and associative. Used in Venn diagrams and real problems.

mathematics.question: Define function.
mathematics.answer: A function is a relation where each input has exactly one output. It is written as f(x). Domain is input set and range is output set. Functions are used in algebra and calculus.

mathematics.question: Define trigonometric ratios.
mathematics.answer: sinθ = opposite/hypotenuse, cosθ = adjacent/hypotenuse, tanθ = opposite/adjacent. These ratios relate angles to triangle sides. Used in physics and engineering.

mathematics.question: State trigonometric identities.
mathematics.answer: sin²θ + cos²θ = 1, 1 + tan²θ = sec²θ, 1 + cot²θ = cosec²θ. These identities simplify equations and are used in proofs.

mathematics.question: Explain quadratic equation.
mathematics.answer: Form ax² + bx + c = 0. Solution: x = (-b ± √(b² - 4ac))/2a. Discriminant determines nature of roots. Used in algebra problems.

mathematics.question: Explain arithmetic progression.
mathematics.answer: AP has constant difference. Formula: an = a + (n−1)d. Sum: Sn = n/2[2a+(n−1)d]. Used in sequences and finance.

mathematics.question: Explain geometric progression.
mathematics.answer: GP has constant ratio. Formula: an = ar^(n−1). Sum: Sn = a(1−r^n)/(1−r). Used in growth models.

mathematics.question: Define logarithm.
mathematics.answer: Logarithm is inverse of exponent. If a^x=b, then loga b=x. Laws help simplify expressions.

mathematics.question: Explain permutations.
mathematics.answer: Arrangement of objects. Formula: nPr = n!/(n−r)!. Order matters. Used in probability.

physics.question: Define motion.
physics.answer: Motion is change in position with time. Types include uniform and non-uniform motion. Described using displacement and velocity.

physics.question: Define velocity and acceleration.
physics.answer: Velocity = displacement/time. Acceleration = change in velocity/time. Both are vector quantities.

physics.question: State equations of motion.
physics.answer: v=u+at, s=ut+½at², v²=u²+2as. Used in uniformly accelerated motion.

physics.question: Explain Newton’s laws.
physics.answer: 1st: inertia, 2nd: F=ma, 3rd: action-reaction. Fundamental laws of motion.

physics.question: Define work.
physics.answer: Work = Force × displacement. Unit is Joule. Work is done when displacement occurs.

physics.question: Define kinetic energy.
physics.answer: KE = ½mv². Energy due to motion. Depends on velocity.

physics.question: Define potential energy.
physics.answer: PE = mgh. Energy due to position. Depends on height.

physics.question: Define gravitation.
physics.answer: F = Gm1m2/r². Force of attraction between masses.

chemistry.question: Explain atomic structure.
chemistry.answer: Atom has nucleus and electrons. Bohr model explains shells.

chemistry.question: Define chemical bonding.
chemistry.answer: Force holding atoms together. Types: ionic, covalent.

chemistry.question: Explain ionic bond.
chemistry.answer: Formed by electron transfer. Example NaCl.

chemistry.question: Explain covalent bond.
chemistry.answer: Formed by sharing electrons. Example H2.

chemistry.question: Define solution.
chemistry.answer: Homogeneous mixture of solute and solvent.

chemistry.question: Explain catalyst.
chemistry.answer: Speeds up reaction without being consumed.

chemistry.question: Explain redox reaction.
chemistry.answer: Oxidation = loss of electrons, reduction = gain.

biology.question: Define cell.
biology.answer: Basic unit of life. Contains nucleus and organelles.

biology.question: Define respiration.
biology.answer: Breakdown of food to release energy.

biology.question: Define tissue.
biology.answer: Group of similar cells performing function.

biology.question: Explain digestion.
biology.answer: Breakdown of food into simple substances.

biology.question: Define biodiversity.
biology.answer: Variety of life forms on Earth.

english.question: Define noun.
english.answer: Name of person, place, or thing.

english.question: Explain paragraph writing.
english.answer: Group of sentences on one topic.

gk.question: What is constitution?
gk.answer: Set of laws governing a country.
